message:
refactor(mux): add explicit error types and improve error handling

- Define explicit error types: VaError, CreateError, ResizeError in
  video_encoder_linux.zig; WsError in ws_server.zig; IoError,
  CompressionError in transfer.zig
- Remove redundant manual cleanup in video_encoder_linux.zig init()
  where errdefer already handles resource cleanup
- Add missing errdefer in auth.zig init() for state and config_path
- Add named callback types (OnConnectFn, OnMessageFn, OnDisconnectFn)
  with documentation to ws_server.zig
- Convert comments to doc comments (///) for public APIs
